data.title: Manhattan Associates: Only 7% of retailers reach unified commerce maturity
data.description: While the report shows incremental progress since its 2023 launch, 33% of retailers remain in a “basic” category, indicating limited integration across channels.

data.title: Shippo adds to functionality for AI-powered shipping insights, analytics
data.description: New capabilities include AI-generated insights emails, interactive shipping performance maps and deeper cost visibility, according to Shippo. The update to Shippo Intelligence also adds two dashboards focused on surcharges and positive adjustments.

data.title: Ecommerce Trends: The fastest-growing online retailers in 2026
data.description: Amazon and Walmart's success only tells part of the story for online retail over the past year, as three merchandise categories outpaced everyone else.

data.title: Analysis: Shipping surcharges surge across carriers, reshape ecommerce economics
data.description: The pressure is forcing B2B ecommerce companies to rethink fulfillment as a core part of pricing strategy.

data.title: USPS to add temporary 8% package-shipping surcharge
data.description: The surcharge is expected to have the greatest impact on small and mid-sized ecommerce sellers and distributors that depend on USPS for cost-effective ground shipping.
